original_prompt:
Problem: For $\pi\leq\theta<2\pi$, let \[ P=\dfrac12\cos\theta-\dfrac14\sin2\theta-\dfrac18\cos3\theta+\dfrac1{16}\sin4\theta+\dfrac1{32}\cos5\theta-\dfrac1{64}\sin6\theta-\dfrac1{128}\cos7\theta+\dotsb \]and \[ Q=1-\dfrac12\sin\theta-\dfrac14\cos2\theta+\dfrac1{8}\sin3\theta+\dfrac1{16}\cos4\theta-\dfrac1{32}\sin5\theta-\dfrac1{64}\cos6\theta+\dfrac1{128}\sin7\theta +\dotsb\]so that $\frac PQ = \frac{2\sqrt2}7$. Find $\sin\theta.$

Instruction: Solve the problem and provide the final answer.
perturbed_prompt:
Problem: Given $\pi\leq\theta<2\pi$, consider two series: 
\[ P=\dfrac12\cos\theta-\dfrac14\sin2\theta-\dfrac18\cos3\theta+\dfrac1{16}\sin4\theta+\dfrac1{32}\cos5\theta-\dfrac1{64}\sin6\theta-\dfrac1{128}\cos7\theta+\dotsb \]
and 
\[ Q=1-\dfrac12\sin\theta-\dfrac14\cos2\theta+\dfrac1{8}\sin3\theta+\dfrac1{16}\cos4\theta-\dfrac1{32}\sin5\theta-\dfrac1{64}\cos6\theta+\dfrac1{128}\sin7\theta +\dotsb\]
Given that $\frac{P}{Q} = \frac{2\sqrt2}{7}$, determine the value of $\sin\theta.$

Instruction: Solve the problem and provide the final answer.
